title: Change hero CTA button color to white-pink

requirements.text: In frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx, locate the CTA button element in the hero section identified by the XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[3]/div[5]/a[1]/button[1] and change its background color from white to a white-pink tone (e.g., bg-pink-100 or #fff0f5). Ensure the button text remains legible against the new background.
acceptanceCriteria: The CTA button in the hero section of HomePage.tsx has a white-pink background color (e.g., bg-pink-100, #fff0f5, or similar soft pinkish-white tone) instead of white.
Button text is clearly legible against the new white-pink background.
No other buttons or elements outside the specified XPath target are changed.

constraints: Only the button element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[3]/div[5]/a[1]/button[1] should be modified.
Do not alter any other elements, colors, or styles on the page.
nonGoals: Changing any other white elements on the homepage or site-wide.
Modifying button text, size, shape, or any property other than background color.
